summary_en: 5,209,200 shares (1.0% of issued shares) to be cancelled on 2026-06-05. Post-cancellation issued share count: 496,153,600 shares.
title_en: Notice regarding cancellation of treasury shares
translation_en_brief: MonotaRO announced on 2026-05-29 that its Board of Directors has resolved to cancel 5,209,200 treasury shares, representing 1.0% of issued shares outstanding as of 2026-04-30. The cancellation will take effect on 2026-06-05 pursuant to Article 178 of the Companies Act. Post-cancellation, the company's issued share count will be 496,153,600 shares.
